title: King George Want No Smoke (VPB)
description: Vic's Point Blank, Founding fathers intended classic (survival friendly). Fires 4 shots per minute for 4 ruffians out and away!
body:
**King George Want No Smoke Provides a simple, (almost surival friendly) effective flintlock musket based on firearms made in the 18th century. Made with an aesthetically pleasing model and a complete set of basic reload animations. Sound assets are mixed and modified, made from a paid sound library.**
_"As the Founding Fathers intended, I provided you a musket for home defence along with the right to bare arms. It is chambered in smoothbore, firing up to blazing speed of 4 shots per minute! An iron nugget round shot packs a golf ball sized hole through a diamond helmet burrowing into your oppenents brain. Fires with outstanding accuracy that will miss point blank nailing your friends Minecraft dog!"_ ## Statistics/Ballistics: Damage: 25.00 (Body) 75.00 (head) Accuracy: STORM TROOPER LEVEL or ~50 blocks Firerate: 3-4 RPM (15 seconds reload)
## (Both require VPB Weapons Printer):
![Paper Cartridge Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63076bd47382d52ba50998ff59bc94fdee55e4f0_0.webp) ![Musket Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d2ae6b602c971f9323a245b8bc403e2d8851012_0.webp)
